form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.9 lengths over 400m at Geelong in a handy (22.71), beating Paw Missy. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 9 over 410m at Horsham behind Hatari beaten 5 lengths (23.43) in a Grade 5. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.75) when seventh over 425m at this track in a Special conditions Veteran race. Goes very well from the draw boasting six places from 10 starts. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by one length at Shepparton over 390m (22.15) beating Ruxton Shine in Grade 4 on April 6. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Could manage only fifth last time but caught the eye the start prior when she clocked a slick 25.42 over 450m finishing second at Shepparton. Rates a top chance with a repeat here.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start by 2.75 lengths at Ballarat (22.57) beating So So Good in a Mix 6/7 on April 8. Can go well again with the right run.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Geelong to win by 2.25 lengths in 22.67, beating Paw Xanthie. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 390m at Shepparton behind Spring Laver beaten 11 lengths (23.06). Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing eighth (20.76) at Capalaba before going for a four months spell. Looks tested.
